title: Beehiiv vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: EmailOctopus starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
